summary: Phase 44A: Affiliate Payout Foundation - All backend tests pass (12/12). Frontend fully functional. Fixed JWT signature verification issue in affiliate_dashboard_routes.py to support partner tokens. Re-registered admin_settings_hub_routes.py for payout settings.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: affiliate_dashboard_routes.py was using JWT_SECRET but partner tokens are signed with PARTNER_JWT_SECRET - added fallback to try both secrets
Fixed: admin_settings_hub_routes.py was not registered in server.py - re-registered the router for /api/admin/settings-hub endpoint
test_credentials: Admin: admin@konekt.co.tz / KnktcKk_L-hw1wSyquvd!, Partner: demo.partner@konekt.com / Partner123!
seed_data_creation: Created test payout account (M-Pesa) during testing - cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 44A Affiliate Payout Foundation complete. Wallet endpoint returns all 8 fields (pending, available, paid_out, pending_withdrawal, minimum_payout, payout_cycle, payout_methods, can_withdraw). Payout accounts CRUD works for mobile_money and bank_transfer. Payout request requires affiliate profile (partner user without affiliate profile gets 404). Admin Settings Hub has Payout Settings tab with affiliate_minimum_payout, sales_minimum_payout, payout_cycle, payout_review_mode, manual_payout_approval fields.

backend_wallet.evidence: Returns pending, available, paid_out, pending_withdrawal, minimum_payout, payout_cycle, payout_methods, can_withdraw

backend_payout_accounts_create_mobile.evidence: Creates mobile money account with provider, phone_number, account_name

backend_payout_accounts_create_bank.evidence: Creates bank account with bank_name, account_number, account_name

backend_payout_request.evidence: Requires affiliate profile (404 without), validates amount (400 for 0)

backend_settings_hub_get.evidence: Returns payouts section with affiliate_minimum_payout, sales_minimum_payout, payout_cycle

backend_settings_hub_put.evidence: Saves and persists payouts section changes

frontend_affiliate_payouts_page.evidence: 4 KPI cards (Pending, Available, Pending Withdrawal, Paid Out) with TZS prefix, Request Withdrawal section with amount/method/account inputs, minimum payout warning, Payout Accounts section with Add button, Payout History section

frontend_admin_settings_payout_tab.evidence: Affiliate Min Payout, Sales Min Payout, Payout Cycle, Review Mode fields visible and editable

fixes_applied.issue: JWT signature verification failed for partner tokens
fixes_applied.fix: Added PARTNER_JWT_SECRET and fallback logic to try both JWT secrets when decoding tokens

fixes_applied.issue: get_user returned None for partner users not in users collection
fixes_applied.fix: Added logic to create minimal user object from token payload when user not found in DB

fixes_applied.issue: admin_settings_hub_routes was not registered (commented out as legacy)
